issues.offending_span: Revenue declined 39.12% YoY in Q1 2025 before rebounding with 36.27% YoY growth in Q2 2025 (K001)

However, no revenue data is provided in the evidence chunks (C007 and C014 are Net Income), and no calculation results for K001 are provided in the 'Cited Calculation Results' section.
